summary_en: 光通信 authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: 光通信が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: 光通信 authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: 光通信が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: Going-private (parent) disclosed for 光通信. Take-private transaction removes the float and resets capital policy.
summary_jp: 光通信に対する完全子会社化を開示。非公開化により資本政策が再構築。
